description_long: This is a whimsical stuffed toy resembling a cartoon rabbit, characterized by its large, round head and oversized ears adorned with pink spiral patterns. The toy's face features asymmetrical, spiral-shaped eyes—one black and one pink—along with a small, triangular black nose and a subtle, curved mouth. Its body is small and cylindrical, with thin, outstretched arms and short legs, dressed in a simple red skirt. The surface appears soft and plush, with a matte finish and visible fabric texture. The color palette is primarily white with pink accents on the ears, cheeks, and skirt, giving it a playful and endearing appearance. This toy would likely be found in urban parks, playgrounds, or as a lost item on sidewalks.
description: A soft, cartoonish rabbit stuffed toy with spiral eyes, large ears, and a red skirt, featuring a white and pink color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rabbit's face with spiral eyes, pink cheeks, and both large ears clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, one ear, and the thin arm extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both ears, and the pink skirt, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other ear, the side of the head, and the arm extending outward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is playful and slightly dizzy, with spiral-shaped eyes and a small, curved mouth. The asymmetrical eyes and pink cheeks add to its whimsical and quirky appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms extended outward and ears perked up, giving an alert and animated posture.
